overall.description: Cinematic game footage depicting a first-person perspective wading through a shallow forest river at night. The camera moves steadily through dark, rippling water surrounded by pine trees and rocks, eventually climbing onto the rocky riverbank.

events.description: camera dips low toward the water surface, nearly submerging, then begins to rise

agents.ego_description: wading slowly through the shallow river water, moving toward the distant bank

entered.detail: dark rippling water filling the lower half of the frame with reflective surface
dense evergreen trees lining the left riverbank against the night sky
dense evergreen trees lining the right riverbank
boulder protruding from the river water ahead
dark overcast sky visible through the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view wading through a shallow, dark river at night. The water ripples around the camera as it moves forward through the stream, with pine-lined banks visible on both sides. Midway through, the camera dips low toward the water surface before rising again, continuing toward a large rock formation in the center of the river.

events.description: moving closer to the right riverbank, individual pine trees becoming distinct from the forest mass

agents.ego_description: continuing to wade through the river, steering toward the right bank while navigating around rocks

entered.detail: grassy inclined bank leading up from the water's edge on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera continues moving through the river, having recovered from its low dip. The right bank with its sloped, tree-covered terrain grows noticeably closer, while the large rock formation passes by on the left and recedes into the distance. The water remains dark and rippled as the perspective shifts toward the right shoreline.

events.description: entering the tree line along the right bank, canopy overhead blocking the sky
beginning to angle toward the shore to exit the water

agents.ego_description: moving along the right riverbank, passing closely by individual pine trees and underbrush

entered.detail: individual tree trunks passing by closely on the right side
low vegetation and shrubs at the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the dense tree line along the right bank, passing close to pine trunks and underbrush. The sky becomes obscured by the forest canopy overhead. The left side of the river opens up to reveal the distant opposite shore, while the camera angles toward the right bank preparing to exit the water.

events.description: exiting the river water onto the rocky shore, ground surface changes from water to gravel

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the river onto the rocky bank, moving uphill away from the water's edge

entered.detail: uneven rocky and gravelly terrain of the river shore
solid ground surface no longer covered by water

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the water onto the rocky riverbank, transitioning from the flowing river to the uneven gravelly shore. The ground becomes solid and dry as the perspective moves uphill away from the water's edge. The night sky becomes visible again through the trees as the camera moves through the forest edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the center of a dark, rippling river toward the solid elevation of a forested riverbank. It begins by wading through the shallow stream between pine-lined banks, with the camera dipping low toward the water's surface before rising to pass a large central rock formation. As the perspective shifts toward the right, the rock recedes into the distance while the sloped, tree-covered shoreline grows closer. The scene then moves into the dense tree line, where the forest canopy obscures the sky and the camera brushes past pine trunks and underbrush. Finally, the camera exits the flowing water onto an uneven gravelly shore, transitioning to dry ground as it moves uphill and back into the open night sky.
